title: How a neutral grid bot earns in sideways markets
description: A neutral grid bot earns by capturing the spread between limit orders as price oscillates. Learn the mechanics, a worked example, and what can go wrong.

title: Long vs Short vs Neutral grid: when to use each direction
description: Grid direction determines your exposure when price trends, how funding affects you, and which regimes suit the strategy. Here's how to choose.

title: How to size your grid range using historical volatility
description: Too narrow and price breaks out. Too wide and fills are infrequent. Here's how to use realised volatility to set a range that holds.

title: The hidden cost of grid bots: funding rate drag explained
description: Funding accrues silently on open positions every 8 hours. Here's how to calculate it and whether it will consume your grid income.

title: How to backtest a grid strategy before deploying capital
description: A step-by-step walkthrough of running a historical backtest — from sourcing OHLCV data to interpreting the results.

title: Reading your Monte Carlo results: what the percentile bands mean
description: The fan chart, percentile bands, Sharpe, Calmar, win rate — what each metric in the Monte Carlo output actually tells you and how to use it.

title: How grid bot liquidation actually works — and how to calculate your price
description: Liquidation on a grid bot shifts constantly as orders fill and open contracts accumulate. Here's how to calculate it and why the danger zone is closer than most traders expect.

title: How many grids should you run? The spacing vs fill-frequency trade-off
description: More grids means more fills — until fees eat the profit. Here's how to find the right grid count for your range, capital, and fee rate.

title: Arithmetic vs geometric grid spacing: which is right for your setup
description: Arithmetic grids earn a fixed dollar amount per round trip. Geometric grids earn a fixed percentage. The difference matters most over wide ranges and volatile assets.

title: Market regime detection: when to deploy a grid bot and when to wait
description: A grid bot deployed into a trending market will lose money reliably. Here's how to identify the regimes that suit a grid strategy and the signals that say wait.

title: What leverage to use on a perpetual futures grid bot
description: Leverage amplifies both income and liquidation risk. Here's how to calculate the right leverage for your range, capital, and risk tolerance.
